title: Landmark Group India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Landmark Group India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
